case_title: PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P. VS. DLS LOGISTICS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-27-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) DARIO SMITH. THE FEB-28-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040784) AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DARIO DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100028547), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P. SERVED DEC-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE DEC-08-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT DLS LOGISTICS, LLC
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100034668) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100040035) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT DLS LOGISTICS, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-10-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF JAMES SHERRILL IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040784) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENSKE TRUCK LEASING CO. L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DLS LOGISTICS, LLC $33,461.50 PRINCIPAL, $6,121.50 INTEREST, $750.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,333.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040784)
